Table of Contents

Class ConnectionManager

Namespace
Service.Helpers
Assembly
Service.dll

Provides strongly-typed access to named connection strings defined in App.config.

public static class ConnectionManager
Inheritance
object
ConnectionManager
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Two connection strings are expected:

  • BaseConnectionName — used for system/infrastructure repositories (users, logs, permissions).
  • BusinessConnectionName — used for all business-domain repositories and transactional UoW operations.

Fields

BaseConnectionName

Connection string name for the infrastructure database (users, logs, permissions).

public const string BaseConnectionName = "IngSoftwareBase"

Field Value

string

BusinessConnectionName

Connection string name for the business database (clients, reservations, payments, etc.).

public const string BusinessConnectionName = "IngSoftwareNegocio"

Field Value

string

Methods

GetBaseConnectionString()

Returns the connection string for BaseConnectionName.

public static string GetBaseConnectionString()

Returns

string

GetBusinessConnectionString()

Returns the connection string for BusinessConnectionName.

public static string GetBusinessConnectionString()

Returns

string

GetConnectionString(string)

Retrieves a connection string by name from App.config / Web.config.

public static string GetConnectionString(string name = "IngSoftwareBase")

Parameters

name string

The connection string key. Defaults to BaseConnectionName.

Returns

string

The raw connection string value.

Exceptions

ConfigurationErrorsException

Thrown when the named connection string is absent or empty in the configuration file.
